About This Property

An Unforgettable Brampton Retreat

Experience an unforgettable getaway in this gorgeous 7-bedroom, 5.5-bath Brampton retreat — ideal for large families, corporate groups, and extended business stays that value style, space, and comfort.

This spacious and beautifully styled home blends elegance and practicality across three fully equipped levels. From the grand curved staircase in the foyer to the gourmet chef's kitchen and sprawling backyard oasis, every detail has been curated for an elevated experience.

The main floor features an inviting family room with plush sofas, a fireplace, and Smart TV flowing seamlessly into a gourmet kitchen and two generous dining areas. Step out to a large private backyard with a charming gazebo, patio lounge, and relaxing swing.

Upstairs, four beautifully appointed bedrooms include king beds and private or semi-private bathrooms. The fully finished basement adds three additional queen bedrooms, a second full kitchen, lounge area, and two more bathrooms — ideal for extended groups or multi-team accommodations.
